title: Launcher maintenance guide (public SDK)
desc: How to build, test, and maintain WKAppBot.Launcher in the public SDK repo. Build commands, hot-swap, pipe relay debug, CI, and public-release checklist.
steps: Repo: d:\GitHub\wkappbot-sdk -- Launcher source PUBLIC. Core source PRIVATE (binary only in bin\wkappbot-core.exe)
Build: build.cmd (full) OR dotnet publish csharp/src/WKAppBot.Launcher/WKAppBot.Launcher.csproj -c Release -p:SkipDeployLauncher=true -o bin
AOT requires MSVC linker (Visual Studio). build.cmd auto-prepends VS Installer dir. Missing symptom: MSB3073 vswhere not recognized
Core binary: downloaded via build.cmd --download-only from latest GitHub Release, or placed manually. ResolveCoreExe() = ProcessPath dirname + wkappbot-core.exe
Hot-swap: launcher watches wkappbot-core.new.exe. Drain pipes -> rename atomically. Trigger: eye tick --timeout 15. Never kill Eye manually
Debug tracing: WKAPPBOT_DEBUG=1 enables relay log at %TEMP%\wkappbot_relay_dbg.txt. Do not hardcode C:\Temp in source
CI: build.yml builds launcher+core. extended-smoke.yml runs 188 tests on windows-latest. Triggers on push to csharp/ and smoke script changes
Public-safe checklist: no hardcoded dev paths, no API keys, no D:\GitHub\WKAppBot refs in Launcher source. Run audit before PR
Suggest/skill filing: run D:\GitHub\WKAppBot\bin\wkappbot-core.exe from d:\GitHub\wkappbot-sdk CWD. Never cd to WKAppBot first (breaks project tracking)

license status: Launcher-owned fast-exit (Program.cs, before Eye pipe routing). Calls LicenseStatus.PrintAsync() directly -- Core never receives this command. Token: GH_TOKEN env > hosts.yml > gh auth token keyring fallback. AOT constraint: do NOT use JsonSerializer.Serialize(anonymous type) -- use manual string escaping instead (IL3050/IL2026 errors).
author: claude
